title: Garlic Keto Crunch
description: A crispy and flavorful garlic-based dish perfect for a solo dinner or snack, following keto principles and incorporating fermented elements for added depth.
instructions: Grind the garlic clove into a fine paste using a mortar and pestle.
In a mixing bowl, combine the ground garlic with flaxseeds, water, and olive oil. Mix well until fully combined.
Season the mixture with black pepper to taste.
Transfer the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake in a preheated oven at 170°C (340°F) for 25-30 minutes, flipping once halfway through.
Remove from heat and let it cool slightly before serving.
